description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek, modern design featuring a white toe cap and sole, contrasted by a dark navy blue side panel. The shoe is accented with neon green details, including the laces, eyelets, collar trim, and stitching, giving it a vibrant and sporty appearance. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and textile, while the sole is made of rubber. The shoe has a classic lace-up closure with six pairs of eyelets and a rounded toe. The interior is lightly padded and beige in color, suggesting comfort for everyday urban wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A stylish low-top sneaker with a white toe and sole, navy blue sides, and neon green accents on the laces, trim, and stitching.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white toe, navy blue side panel, neon green laces, and trim details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded white toe, neon green laces, and symmetrical eyelet arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the navy blue panel, white toe, and neon green trim and stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the navy blue heel, neon green stitching, and the open collar.
